meta.question: Who funded Ridesharing Works for Austin in 2016?

event.question: Who funded Ridesharing Works for Austin in 2016?

event.description: Identify top contributors to the Austin PAC Ridesharing Works for Austin in the 2016 cycle.

source.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Uber Tech -> Ridesharing Works for Austin, $1,000,000, 04/28/2016.
Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Lyft, Inc. -> Ridesharing Works for Austin, $60,906.29, 06/29/2016.

event.description: Write up findings on who funded Ridesharing Works for Austin in 2016 and summarize top contributors.

event.text: Two Silicon Valley rideshare firms almost entirely funded the Austin PAC Ridesharing Works for Austin in 2016: Uber Tech put in about $3.0 million, while Lyft, Inc. added roughly $226,000, leaving little room for any other financiers in that fight over Austin’s ride-hailing rules.

citations.rowSummary: Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Uber Tech -> Ridesharing Works for Austin, $1,000,000, 04/28/2016.
Austin City Clerk campaign finance, contribution: Lyft, Inc. -> Ridesharing Works for Austin, $60,906.29, 06/29/2016.

event.question: Which other PACs or candidates did Uber Tech and Lyft, Inc. fund in Austin's 2016 cycle?
event.rationale: Tracing other Austin recipients of Uber Tech and Lyft, Inc. reveals broader local influence beyond the ridesharing PAC.
